transcript.text: On 275 and 285, also in stereo on VHF, this is National Radio 1.

The road is completely blocked near the cathedral. It'll be an hour and a half at least before the road is clear.
Keep well away from this part of the A3 near Guildford in Surrey if you possibly can.
And also, I have to tell you, there are still long delays on the northbound carriageway of the M1,
south of Junction 15, the Northampton turnoff.

Be a safe driver, as they said.
